creator: tgen@deepbone.net
text:
Ion-Mihai Tetcu wrote:
> On Mon, 7 Dec 2009 20:20:04 GMT
> "Thomas E. Spanjaard" <tgen@deepbone.net> wrote:
>>  This update breaks IPv6 (AAAA) lookups completely. Opera bug:
>>  DSK-273178; however, you can't browse reports from some odd reason.
> 
> Given the other changes, including security fixes, and the extent of
> usage IPv6 has I don't think it would be a good idea to roll back this
> update.

I didn't expect that to happen either, but having a paper trail might be
useful to expedite things on Opera's end, since their bug tracking
system isn't public :).

Cheers,
-- 
	Thomas E. Spanjaard
	tgen@netphreax.net
	tgen@deepbone.net
